description: Design the "Borealis-1" Tundra orbit based on the mission specification at ~/Desktop/borealis_mission_spec.txt. Use a Differential Corrector to determine the initial RAAN required to target an apogee longitude of 105.0° West (-105.0°). Save the GMAT script to ~/GMAT_output/borealis_tundra.script and export a report containing the spacecraft's Longitude, Latitude, and Altitude at the targeted apoapsis to ~/GMAT_output/apogee_target_report.txt. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
